package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransport() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_for_binary_transport"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag base64 encode/decode roundtrips inside a single process boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
